# programs.noti

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.noti`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.noti.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Noti. |
| `programs.noti.package` | `null or package` | The noti package to use. |
| `programs.noti.settings` | `attribute set of attribute set of string` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/noti/noti.yaml`. See {manpage}`noti.yaml(5)`. for the full list of options. |
